provenance.method: quadrature projection R^l_mm' = sum_i w_i Y^N3D_lm(R d_i) Y^N3D_lm'(d_i), GL(11)x24 grid, exact for band-20 products; deliberately independent of Ivanic-Ruedenberg (1996; erratum 1998), which is what the C++ under test implements
provenance.conventions: active rotation Y(R d) = R^l Y(d); blocks identical for SN3D and N3D; quaternion w,x,y,z Hamilton active, R(q1*q2)=R(q1)R(q2); YPR intrinsic Z-Y'-X'' = Rz(yaw)Ry(pitch)Rx(roll), RH, degrees; frame +X front +Y left +Z up
